title: helianthus annuus var. indicus
intro: Helianthus annuus var. indicus, also known as the Indian sunflower, is a variety of the common sunflower plant native to India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Helianthus annuus var. indicus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
